project.name: Gewis Lab 暖色科技主页
project.styleDefinitionBrief: AI research lab homepage with warm amber/coral tech palette on dark background, rich particle animations, 3D card tilt, magnetic buttons, scroll reveals, and interactive code terminal
project.designRead: AI lab homepage / researchers & developers / warm tech with playful energy / medium density / avoid cold blue-purple generic AI aesthetic

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: warm amber #FF8906 for brand identity, CTAs, and accent highlights
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single brand hue (amber) with coral accent for energy; no secondary brand hue

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: sm=4px, md=8px, lg=12px, xl=16px, full=9999px
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: sans-serif stack with mono for code/technical elements; weight range 400-900
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: glass-morphism cards with subtle borders, glow effects on hover
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: dark layered surfaces with border-first depth; glow shadows for floating elements
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: line icons with brand color; warm-toned hero imagery
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: playful spring animations, magnetic hover, 3D tilt, particle effects

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: fixed top nav with glassmorphism blur, logo + links + CTA, mobile hamburger
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single brand hue amber #FF8906; coral #F25F4C for accent energy
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: sans-serif body, mono for technical elements, weight 400-900
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: dark bg #0F0E17, elevated #1A1926, surface #232136; border-first with glow on hover
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: pill-shaped filled buttons with brand gradient, spring hover animation

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Warm amber/coral tech palette on deep dark background with rich interactive animations

pages.title: 首页
pages.businessScenario: AI research lab homepage showcasing research directions, open source projects, and team achievements
pages.visualNorthStar: Warm particle network hero with floating orbs, 3D tilt research cards, animated code terminal, and spring-animated CTAs
pages.compositionPattern: full-bleed hero → marquee ticker → 2x2 research grid → project showcase cards → dark promo section → stats counter → CTA band → footer
